title: IMMZD18SRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First rotavirus dose from the primary se.en: First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered

Second rotavirus dose from the primary s.en: Second rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered

For a series containing more than two do.en: For a series containing more than two doses, two rotavirus primary series doses of mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products were administered

Third rotavirus dose from the primary se.en: Third rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
